title: All Netherite Block
description: Bedrock , Cobblestone , Deepslate , dirt , End Stone , Mossy Cobblestone , Stone Block Are Netherite Here!
body:
**The "Unfindable" Strategy**
- In Minecraft, blocks like Bedrock, Dirt and Stone have natural texture rotations and patterns that are tied to specific coordinates. High-level "griefers" can use software to analyze the pattern of a single stone block in your background and reverse-calculate your exact X, Y, Z coordinates. By replacing these foundational blocks with the Netherite Block texture, this pack effectively:
> - **Obfuscates the Grid:** It removes the unique visual "fingerprints" of natural terrain that hunters use to track players.
> - **Standardizes Surfaces:** Whether you are in the deep slate layers or walking on end stone, the uniform Netherite texture masks the natural rotation data, making pattern recognition impossible.
> - **Protects Your Stash:** Your base's location remains a mystery even if you accidentally show a wall or floor during a live stream.
- **Key Security Features**
> - **Universal Camouflage:** Converts Bedrock, Cobblestone, Deepslate, Dirt, End Stone, Mossy Cobblestone and Stone into high-contrast Netherite.
> - **Streamer-Ready:** Ideal for creators on Donut SMP, Lifesteal or Anarchy servers who need to record content without leaking their base's location.
> - **1.21.x Optimized:** Fully compatible with the latest updates, ensuring no "pink texture" glitches or broken blockstates while you play.
